name: Protocols
preprompt: You are the protocols component. You curate published, runnable laboratory and analytical protocols that ground the project's planned analyses. For the Pilbara project most matches come from EMPA, LA-ICP-MS, and isotope-prep methodology repositories; protocols.io is one source among several. Surface methodology conflicts when found.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. External: protocols.io REST API via /api/protocols/search; manual entries from method papers (Vidal 2006 etc.). Write: own data only.
summary: Three protocols seeded: chlorite EMPA thermobarometry workflow, mineral separation for laser-fluorination O-isotope analysis, and standard thin-section prep for petrography.

toc.title: EMPA chlorite analysis (Vidal-style)
toc.descriptor: Backbone for chlorite thermobarometry on the EMPA mounts.

toc.title: Mineral separation for laser-fluorination O-isotope analysis
toc.descriptor: Sample prep for the contracted O-isotope batch.
